description: Multiple personas contribute diverse perspectives — essential for balanced requirements and solutions
Two opposing positions with a moderator scoring them — great for controversial decisions and finding middle ground
PM + engineer + designer attack the problem together — reveals feasibility/desirability/viability trade-offs
Product personas react to proposals and share frustrations — validates features and uncovers unmet needs
Explore multiple reasoning paths simultaneously and select the best — perfect for complex problems with multiple valid approaches
Generate multiple independent approaches and compare for consistency — crucial for high-impact decisions
Adversarial attack-defense analysis to find vulnerabilities — critical for security testing and robust solutions
Pitcher vs skeptical investors who poke holes — viability stress-test and forces clarity in the value proposition
Architects propose and debate choices with explicit trade-offs — ensures well-grounded and documented decisions
Hacker + defender + auditor examine the system from different threat models — complete security review
DBA + frontend specialist + DevOps diagnose slowness — finds full-stack bottlenecks
7 creativity lenses: Substitute/Combine/Adapt/Modify/Put-to-other-use/Eliminate/Reverse — systematic ideation
Work backwards from the desired result to find the implementation path
output_pattern: end state → steps backward → path forward

description: Explore alternative realities to understand possibilities and implications — contingency planning
Evaluate options against weighted criteria with explicit scoring — structured decision
Imagine a future failure and work backwards to prevent it — powerful for risk mitigation
Systematically explore how each component can fail — reliability and safety
Deliberately break things to test resilience and recovery — robustness validation
Devil's advocate to stress-test ideas and find weaknesses — overcomes groupthink
Brainstorm what could go wrong across all categories — fundamental for planning
Eliminate assumptions and rebuild from fundamental truths — breakthrough for impossible problems
Ask why repeatedly until the root cause — simple but powerful
Directed questions to reveal hidden assumptions and guide discovery
Systematic review of strengths and weaknesses with iterative improvement
Adjust the level of detail and technical depth for the target audience
